'''Khamar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] and a [[General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was the commander of the [[Praesitlyn Defense Force]]. The fact that [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] refused to send additional aid to [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] made him suspect that someone in the Republic wanted the world attacked. Khamar perished in the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]].
